baker_start.text: Hello there! I'm struggling right now, could you help me out?

responses.text: What do you need help with?

baker_explain.text: I need 1 Egg, 1 Milk, and 1 Wheat to bake my famous cake. Will you find them for me?

responses.text: That sounds like too much work.

baker_accept.text: Oh, thank you! I'll be waiting here.

baker_progress.text: Do you have my ingredients yet?

baker_check_items.text: Perfect! This is exactly what I need. You're a lifesaver!

baker_finished.text: Thanks again for the help! Best of luck on your travels.
